문맥: 쯔양이 대전의 'Hyangmi's Jjamppong'에서 다양한 요리를 시식하며 경험을 나누는 장면입니다. 특히 비프 로제 자장면과 관련된 부분에서, 음식이 매우 많고 다양하다는 점을 강조하며, 아이들이 좋아할 만한 매운맛과 풍부한 맛을 언급합니다. 또한, 쯔양은 자신이 좋아하는 조개 요리와 관련하여 더 많은 음식을 맛보고 싶다는 의지를 표현합니다. 마지막으로, 그녀는 서울에도 이런 맛집이 생기면 좋겠다는 농담과 함께 이번 식사가 만족스러웠다는 소감을 전합니다.

[15:09 ~ 17:02] It's quite a lot
It's a bit spicy, kids would love it
Love it
(Empty)
(Beef rosé jjamppong CLEARED!)
(Hand-picking the shells again...)
(Grumble...) I wanted raw cockles...
(Still pissed) Producer had a bowl all to himself...
It's fun to separate the shells, lol
Mine was a bit boring, lol
(That's your excuse? Lmao) You seemed so happy eating it
It's really delicious
Cockles are delicious
I'm gonna be eating them all!
(Endless supplies of cockles...)
('Hyangmi's Jjampong,' to the last drop, CLEARED!)
[17:02 ~ 17:23] Did you eat well? Hehe
It's so delicious, sir
- Cockle jjamppong was the best...! - That's good
Could I open the 1st branch in Seoul...? Lol
Producer will open the 2nd branch, lololol
(It's a joke that is not like a joke... Heehee!) Yeah, yeah...
Anyways, I had a great meal once again!
